_comment: Standing render rules, keyed by tile family. Written by the in-viewer report form; read live by ZoneRenderer every frame. Safe to hand-edit. CONFIG, not a ticket queue. A reference copy is committed at overrides.seed.json.

sw_axle.position: POS: FLOAT centered in the tile

sw_millstone.fill: FILL: fill the holes with BACKGROUND

sw_waterwheel.fill: FILL: fill the holes with BACKGROUND
